news.paragraph: Apple is seeing positive momentum driven by Wall Street confidence in its supply chain strength and AI services potential. Traders should also monitor upcoming software updates featuring a customizable camera app and potential macro volatility from the Trump-Xi summit regarding US-China trade relations.
